description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with two stages, test and deploy. In the test stage define a UnitTest job that runs on the python:3.6 Docker image; its before_script adds the Google Chrome APT key, adds the Chrome repository, installs unzip, google-chrome-stable and xvfb, downloads and unzips chromedriver 2.32, installs pip requirements from requirements.txt, runs python manage.py makemigrations and migrate, collects static files, and starts the Django development server in the background; the script then executes coverage run --include='lab_*/*' manage.py test followed by coverage report -m, and the job runs only on_success. In the deploy stage define a Deployment job that runs on the ruby:2.4 image; its before_script installs the dpl gem and the Heroku CLI, and the script runs dpl --provider=heroku --app=$HEROKU_APPNAME --api-key=$HEROKU_APIKEY, exports HEROKU_API_KEY=$HEROKU_APIKEY, and runs heroku run --app $HEROKU_APPNAME migrate; the job sets the production environment with URL $HEROKU_APP_HOST.
